title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 16–19, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But my treasure is in danger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You find your own way up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nami! I'm going to kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I won't let them get to the village...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That guy runs so fast, I lost sight of him already!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If they dare touch my treasure, I will never forgive them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There's someone... up on the slope!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm Captain usop! I've been waiting here for you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've made all prepara- tions! If you don't want to die, then retreat at once!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I thought I was running to the north shore?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yes! This is my own hair

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
